metadata.description: Full GitHub launch in 4 minutes — 12 parallel agents across 3 phases with competitor research, SEO name scoring, auto-embedded social preview, GitHub Pages, and 7-day distribution calendar.

plugins.name: github-launch-agent
plugins.description: Agentic evolution of github-launch. Spawns 12 parallel agents across 3 phases — research, SVG, topics, and files run simultaneously in Phase 1, cutting launch time from 20 minutes to 4. Includes SEO name scoring, competitor README mining, social preview auto-embedded in README, GitHub Pages landing page, scored description candidates, and a 7-day timed distribution calendar. Trigger: 'agentic github launch', 'parallel github launch', 'push to github'.
